title: You're Not Behind (Yet): Learn AI Agents in 13 Minutes
description: A distilled walkthrough of theMITmonk's 'Learn AI Agents in 13 Minutes' — the ARR test for what belongs to an agent, the four workers under the hood, the OODA loop that lets agents reroute, the GPS check before you automate, why narrow ownership wins, and why judgment becomes the scarce skill.
